extension.description: Common library used by plugin.video.relay and service.subtitles.relay. Indexes Stremio addon manifests and routes catalog/meta/stream/subtitles requests by declared resource, type and idPrefix.
extension.news: v0.1.7 - Fix Stremio account login/sync on iOS/tvOS: account HTTP now uses the requests session's bundled CA (certifi) instead of bare urllib, which had no CA bundle on Apple platforms and failed TLS (every account call - login, progress, watched, Continue Watching). v0.1.5 - Harden the watched-bitfield write so a stale/partial meta can never wipe a show's existing episode checkmarks. v0.1.4 - Finished episodes are now recorded as watched in your Stremio account (the per-episode watched bitfield), not just advanced in Continue Watching - so episode checkmarks appear automatically (matches stremio-core completion).
extension.disclaimer: Relay is an independent project and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or associated with the Kodi/XBMC Foundation or Stremio. It ships no media, content or stream sources - it only presents add-ons that you choose to install. Do not use it for piracy or to access content you are not authorised to.
